creator: aviator45003@gmail.com
text:
Sometimes I get the attached screen outputs after a successful UEFI install.

Once I didn't (I booted successfully into the new install) and was
convinced that was because I wiped the drive first, but it seems I was
wrong.

Dmesg from a successful BIOS mode boot also attached.

Thanks for any help.

--
